name: edgee
install_doc: SaaS gateway (la gateway locale `edgee local-gateway` était non maintenue et a été supprimée par edgee — ne plus l'utiliser). Routage via `edgee launch claude`. PRÉREQUIS: `edgee auth login` (navigateur, une fois) + `edgee settings claude` (activer compression; vérifier que reroute NE change PAS le modèle). Credential edgee doit être visible dans le HOME du sandbox.
notes: Rust LLM gateway ('Same output, fewer tokens, lower bill'): compresses redundant tool output (logs, file listings, build results) in the request context before it reaches the model. Derived from RTK (credited upstream) but proxy-based instead of hook-based, so it needs no agent opt-in — adoption is N/A like headroom/rtk. Validated on this machine 2026-07-10: full headless Claude Code session through the local gateway (correct answer, cost recorded, gateway stable, teardown clean).
